title: 送友人入蜀
titleEn: Seeing a Friend Off to Shu
author: 李白
content:
见说蚕丛路
崎岖不易行
山从人面起
云傍马头生
芳树笼秦栈
春流绕蜀城
升沉应已定
不必问君平
translation:
They say the road to Shu is winding
Rough and not easy to travel
Mountains rise right from your face
Clouds are born beside your horse's head
Fragrant trees shade the Qin plank road
Spring waters flow around Shu's walls
Rise and fall are already decided
No need to ask the fortune teller
annotation: Li Bai warns his friend: the road to Sichuan is terrifyingly steep. But he ends with wisdom — your fate is already written, so why worry?

title: 夜泊牛渚怀古
titlePinyin: Ye Bo Niu Zhu Huai Gu
titleEn: Mooring at Night at Niu Zhu
author: 李白
content:
牛渚西江夜
青天无片云
登舟望秋月
空忆谢将军
余亦能高咏
斯人不可闻
明朝挂帆席
枫叶落纷纷
translation:
At Niu Zhu on the west river, night
Blue sky without a single cloud
I board my boat, gaze at the autumn moon
Vainly remembering General Xie
I too can recite poetry loudly
But that man cannot be heard
Tomorrow I'll raise my sail
Maple leaves fall thick and fast
annotation: Li Bai moors at night and thinks of a general who recognized talent. He wonders: who will recognize mine? The falling leaves mirror his uncertainty.

title: 听蜀僧濬弹琴
titlePinyin: Ting Shu Seng Jun Tan Qin
titleEn: Listening to Monk Jun Play the Qin
author: 李白
content:
蜀僧抱绿绮
西下峨眉峰
为我一挥手
如听万壑松
客心洗流水
余响入霜钟
不觉碧山暮
秋云暗几重
translation:
A Shu monk holds his green zither
Comes down from Mount Emei's peak
He waves his hands for me
Like hearing ten thousand valley pines
The traveler's heart is washed by flowing water
The lingering sound enters the frost bell
Before I notice, the green mountain darkens
Autumn clouds layer upon layer
annotation: Music so beautiful it washes your soul clean. Li Bai doesn't describe the notes — he describes how they make you feel: pure, still, and surrounded by nature.

title: 渡荆门送别
author: 李白
content:
渡远荆门外
来从楚国游
山随平野尽
江入大荒流
月下飞天镜
云生结海楼
仍怜故乡水
万里送行舟
translation:
Crossing far beyond Jingmen
Coming to wander in Chu land
Mountains follow the plain to their end
The river flows into the great wilderness
The moon flies like a mirror in the sky
Clouds form a sea tower
Still I love my homeland's water
Ten thousand miles, it sends my traveling boat
annotation: Young Li Bai leaves home for the first time. The landscape opens up dramatically — mountains end, rivers stretch forever. Even far away, the water from home follows him.

title: 访戴天山道士不遇
titlePinyin: Fang Dai Tian Shan Dao Shi Bu Yu
titleEn: Visiting a Daoist and Not Finding Him
author: 李白
content:
犬吠水声中
桃花带露浓
树深时见鹿
溪午不闻钟
野竹分青霭
飞泉挂碧峰
无人知所去
愁倚两三松
translation:
Dogs bark among the sound of water
Peach blossoms heavy with dew
Deep in the trees, deer appear now and then
At noon by the stream, no bell is heard
Wild bamboo parts the blue mist
A flying spring hangs from the green peak
No one knows where he's gone
Sorrowfully, I lean on two or three pines
annotation: Li Bai searches for a wise hermit but finds only nature. The empty mountain is more beautiful than any meeting — dogs, deer, mist, and waterfalls.

title: 月夜忆舍弟
titleEn: Moonlit Night: Thinking of My Brother
author: 杜甫
content:
戍鼓断人行
边秋一雁声
露从今夜白
月是故乡明
有弟皆分散
无家问死生
寄书长不达
况乃未休兵
translation:
Garrison drums cut off human travel
Autumn border, a single goose cries
Dew turns white from tonight
The moon is brightest at home
I have brothers, all scattered
No home to ask if they're alive
Letters never arrive
And the war hasn't stopped
annotation: During war, Du Fu can't reach his brothers. The moon is the same everywhere, but somehow it shines brighter where home used to be.

title: 天末怀李白
titleEn: At the End of the World: Thinking of Li Bai
author: 杜甫
content:
凉风起天末
君子意如何
鸿雁几时到
江湖秋水多
文章憎命达
魑魅喜人过
应共冤魂语
投诗赠汨罗
translation:
Cool wind rises at the edge of the world
How are you, my friend?
When will the wild geese arrive?
The rivers and lakes have much autumn water
Good writing hates a successful life
Demons rejoice when good people pass
You should talk with the wronged ghost
And throw a poem into the Miluo River
annotation: Du Fu worries about his best friend Li Bai, exiled far away. 'Good writing hates a successful life' — the best poets suffer the most.

title: 月夜
author: 杜甫
content:
今夜鄜州月
闺中只独看
遥怜小儿女
未解忆长安
香雾云鬟湿
清辉玉臂寒
何时倚虚幌
双照泪痕干
translation:
Tonight's moon in Fu Zhou
She watches alone in her chamber
I pity my little children
Too young to remember Chang'an
Fragrant mist dampens her cloud-like hair
Cold moonlight chills her jade arms
When will we lean together by the thin curtain
Both illuminated, tear stains dried
annotation: Separated from his family by war, Du Fu imagines his wife watching the same moon. The most painful line: his children are too young to even remember him.

title: 春宿左省
titleEn: Spring Night Duty at the Left Office
author: 杜甫
content:
花隐掖垣暮
啾啾栖鸟过
星临万户动
月傍九霄多
不寝听金钥
因风想玉珂
明朝有封事
数问夜如何
translation:
Flowers hide in the palace walls at dusk
Chirping, roosting birds pass by
Stars approach, ten thousand doors stir
The moon nears the highest heaven
I don't sleep, listening for the golden key
In the wind, I imagine jade horse-bells
Tomorrow I have a sealed memorial
I keep asking: how goes the night?
annotation: On night duty, Du Fu can't sleep. He has important advice for the emperor and can't wait for morning.

title: 蜀相
author: 杜甫
content:
丞相祠堂何处寻
锦官城外柏森森
映阶碧草自春色
隔叶黄鹂空好音
三顾频烦天下计
两朝开济老臣心
出师未捷身先死
长使英雄泪满襟
translation:
Where to find the Prime Minister's temple?
Outside Brocade City, cypress trees thick
Green grass by the steps, spring colors for nothing
Through leaves, orioles sing beautiful songs for nothing
Three visits,烦worried plans for the world
Two dynasties, an old minister's devoted heart
The campaign failed, but he died first
Forever making heroes weep
annotation: Du Fu visits Zhuge Liang's temple. The greatest strategist of the Three Kingdoms died before completing his mission. 'The campaign failed, but he died first' — the tragedy of the most capable person who never got enough time.

title: 辋川闲居赠裴秀才迪
titlePinyin: Wang Chuan Xian Ju Zeng Pei Xiu Cai Di
titleEn: Leisurely Living at Wangchuan: To Pei Di
author: 王维
content:
寒山转苍翠
秋水日潺湲
倚杖柴门外
临风听暮蝉
渡头余落日
墟里上孤烟
复值接舆醉
狂歌五柳前
translation:
Cold mountains turn deep blue-green
Autumn waters daily murmur
I lean on my stick by the brush gate
Face the wind, listening to evening cicadas
At the crossing, the setting sun remains
From the village, a single smoke rises
Once again I meet a madman drunk
Singing wildly before the five willows
annotation: Wang Wei's mountain retirement in a perfect day. Mountains, water, cicadas, sunset, cooking smoke — and a drunk friend singing.

title: 酬张少府
author: 王维
content:
晚年惟好静
万事不关心
自顾无长策
空知返旧林
松风吹解带
山月照弹琴
君问穷通理
渔歌入浦深
translation:
In my later years, I only love stillness
I care about nothing in the world
I see I have no great strategy
I only know to return to my old forest
Pine wind blows open my robe
Mountain moon shines as I play the zither
You ask about success and failure
A fisherman's song enters the deep harbor
annotation: Wang Wei has given up on ambition. When asked about life's big questions, he points to the fisherman — some answers are in the silence.

title: 过香积寺
author: 王维
content:
不知香积寺
数里入云峰
古木无人径
深山何处钟
泉声咽危石
日色冷青松
薄暮空潭曲
安禅制毒龙
translation:
I didn't know Xiangji Temple
Several miles into the cloud peaks
Ancient trees, no human path
Deep mountains — where does the bell come from?
Spring sound chokes on dangerous rocks
Sunlight chills the green pines
At dusk, by the empty pool's curve
Meditation tames the poisonous dragon
annotation: Wang Wei gets lost looking for a temple. The deeper he goes, the more mysterious it becomes. The 'poisonous dragon' is desire itself, tamed by stillness.

title: 汉江临眺
author: 王维
content:
楚塞三湘接
荆门九派通
江流天地外
山色有无中
郡邑浮前浦
波澜动远空
襄阳好风日
留醉与山翁
translation:
Chu's border meets the Three Xiang
Jingmen connects the nine streams
The river flows beyond heaven and earth
Mountain colors between being and nothing
Prefectures float on the distant shore
Waves move the far sky
Xiangyang has such fine weather
I'll stay drunk with the mountain old man
annotation: 'The river flows beyond heaven and earth, mountain colors between being and nothing.' Wang Wei paints with philosophy — the landscape dissolves into the infinite.

title: 观猎
author: 王维
content:
风劲角弓鸣
将军猎渭城
草枯鹰眼疾
雪尽马蹄轻
忽过新丰市
还归细柳营
回看射雕处
千里暮云平
translation:
Wind strong, horn bows sing
The general hunts at Wei City
Grass withered, eagle eyes sharp
Snow gone, horse hooves light
Suddenly past Xinfeng market
Back to the Willow Camp
Look back where the eagle was shot
Ten thousand miles of evening clouds, flat
annotation: Wang Wei watches a general hunt. Every line is action — wind, bows, eagles, horses. The final image: looking back at the hunt, everything is calm again under endless clouds.

title: 赋得古原草送别
titlePinyin: Fu De Gu Yuan Cao Song Bie
author: 白居易
content:
离离原上草
一岁一枯荣
野火烧不尽
春风吹又生
远芳侵古道
晴翠接荒城
又送王孙去
萋萋满别情
translation:
Lush, lush grass on the plain
Each year it withers and blooms again
Wildfire cannot burn it all
Spring wind blows and it grows again
Distant fragrance invades the old road
Bright green meets the ruined city
Once more I see a nobleman off
Thick grass, full of parting feelings
annotation: Bai Juyi was only 16 when he wrote this! The grass is a metaphor for resilience — no matter how many times life burns you down, you grow back.

title: 池上
author: 白居易
content:
小娃撑小艇
偷采白莲回
不解藏踪迹
浮萍一道开
translation:
A little child poles a little boat
Steals white lotus and returns
Not knowing how to hide his trail
The duckweed parts in one line
annotation: A child sneaks out to pick lotus flowers, leaving a trail of parted duckweed behind him. Childhood innocence in just 20 characters.

title: 问刘十九
author: 白居易
content:
绿蚁新醅酒
红泥小火炉
晚来天欲雪
能饮一杯无
translation:
Green ants on newly brewed wine
A small red clay fire stove
Evening comes, the sky wants to snow
Can you drink a cup with me?
annotation: The most inviting poem ever written. A warm fire, fresh wine, snow falling outside — and a simple question: will you join me?

title: 暮江吟
author: 白居易
content:
一道残阳铺水中
半江瑟瑟半江红
可怜九月初三夜
露似真珠月似弓
translation:
A streak of setting sun spreads on the water
Half the river jade-green, half red
How lovely, the night of the third of September
Dewdrops like pearls, the moon like a bow
annotation: Bai Juyi watches sunset paint the river in two colors. Then night falls — pearl-like dew and a crescent moon.

title: 大林寺桃花
author: 白居易
content:
人间四月芳菲尽
山寺桃花始盛开
长恨春归无觅处
不知转入此中来
translation:
In the world, April's flowers have all faded
The mountain temple's peach blossoms just begin to bloom
I always grieve that spring leaves with no place to find it
I didn't know it had turned and come here
annotation: Spring is gone from the valley — but up in the mountain temple, it's just beginning. Sometimes what you're looking for hasn't disappeared, it's just somewhere unexpected.

title: 嫦娥
author: 李商隐
content:
云母屏风烛影深
长河渐落晓星沉
嫦娥应悔偷灵药
碧海青天夜夜心
translation:
On the mica screen, candle shadows deepen
The Milky Way gradually sets, morning stars sink
Chang'e must regret stealing the elixir of life
Blue sea, green sky — night after night, her heart
annotation: The moon goddess has immortality but no one to love. Is eternal life worth eternal loneliness?

title: 贾生
author: 李商隐
content:
宣室求贤访逐臣
贾生才调更无伦
可怜夜半虚前席
不问苍生问鬼神
translation:
The Xuan Room seeks talent, visits the exiled
Jia Yi's ability surpasses all
Pitiable — at midnight, the seat is empty
He asks about ghosts and gods, not the people
annotation: The emperor summons a brilliant scholar at midnight — not to ask about governing, but about ghosts. Li Shangyin's sarcasm is sharp: rulers care more about the supernatural than their own people.

title: 隋宫
author: 李商隐
content:
乘兴南游不戒严
九重谁省谏书函
春风举国裁宫锦
半作障泥半作帆
translation:
In high spirits, he tours the south without caution
Who in the palace reads the warning letters?
In spring wind, the whole country cuts palace brocade
Half for mud guards, half for sails
annotation: The Sui emperor's extravagance: the whole country cuts silk just for his boats. Half for mud guards, half for sails. Luxury built on the people's exhaustion.

title: 泊秦淮
author: 杜牧
content:
烟笼寒水月笼沙
夜泊秦淮近酒家
商女不知亡国恨
隔江犹唱后庭花
translation:
Mist veils the cold water, moon veils the sand
At night I moor on the Qinhuai near a wine house
The singing girls don't know the grief of a fallen nation
Across the river, they still sing 'Flowers in the Back Court'
annotation: While the country crumbles, entertainers keep singing. Du Mu's anger is quiet but sharp — a warning that forgetting history dooms you to repeat it.

title: 寄扬州韩绰判官
titlePinyin: Ji Yang Zhou Han Chao Pan Guan
titleEn: To Judge Han Chuo in Yangzhou
author: 杜牧
content:
青山隐隐水迢迢
秋尽江南草未凋
二十四桥明月夜
玉人何处教吹箫
translation:
Green mountains faint, water stretches far
Autumn ends, but Jiangnan grass hasn't withered
On the Twenty-Four Bridge, a moonlit night
Where is the jade lady teaching flute playing?
annotation: Du Mu remembers Yangzhou's beauty — faint mountains, endless water, a moonlit bridge. He asks about a friend who taught music. It's nostalgia for a golden time.
